text: The conditional proposition \(p \rightarrow q\) is false only when _____.

What is true about the biconditional statement \(p \leftrightarrow q\)?
answer: It is true when \(p\) and \(q\) have the same truth value

b: It is false when \(p\) and \(q\) have the same truth value
c: It is true when \(p\) and \(q\) have the same truth value
d: It is false if both \(p\) and \(q\) are true
